title: Set of 3 Professional Stainless Steel German Mixing Bowls.
features: Stainless Steel won't stain or retain odours
Depth perfect for electric mixer use. Rolled Edge for easy Grip
Perfect for Chilling, Marinating, Serving as a Salad Bowl
Stackable inside each other for Easy Storage
18cm Bowl Capacity - 1.5 Litres, 22cm Bowl Capacity - 2.5 Litres, 26 cm Bowl Capacity 4 Litres.
description: Prima professional set of 3 stainless steel mixing bowls, sizes: 18 cm, 22 cm and 26 cm. Perfect for many tasks in the kitchen. These useful stainless steel mixing bowls have a satin finish on the outside and a polished finish on the inside. They are also easy to clean. Simply put in the dishwasher.
